libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Keep generated coverage self-contained by starting a local Vert.x HttpServer on 127.0.0.1 and exercising WebClient/WebClientSession/CachingWebClient against it rather than relying on external HTTP services. For nativeTest/native-image run on JDK 25 current-defaults, set runtime system properties: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The resolved 5.0.1 runtime classpath uses io.netty:netty-common:4.2.2.Final via vertx-core, while the existing 5.0.0 test already documents Netty 4.2.x requiring explicit unsafe access on Java 25 native runs.
io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 is optional in the vertx-web-client POM; avoid OAuth2-specific coverage unless the workflow intentionally adds that optional dependency.
Final necessity of the native runtime properties should still be confirmed by the repository Gradle/native-image tasks.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is needed for meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage; tests can use an in-process Vert.x HTTP server. However, 5.0.1 still pulls Netty 4.2.x like 5.0.0, so Java 25 native-image runs likely need the same Netty unsafe-access runtime properties already used for 5.0.0.
